narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देशों को इससे बड़ा झटका लगा।
narratives.reasoning: The text criticizes Western countries for their miscalculation and hubris, stating they assumed the whole world would support them in pressuring Putin, but this did not happen, dealing them a major blow. This directly discredits Western diplomatic assumptions and strategy.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
narratives.reasoning: The text highlights the adverse outcome for Europe (specifically an energy crisis) as a direct consequence of the war and their dependence on Russian energy, framing it as a major blow to European countries.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है... यूक्रेन को भी भ्रष्टाचार के जांच को लेकर मिलिट्री अधिकारियों के देश छोड़ने पर रोक लगानी पड़ी।
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption and irregularities in military equipment procurement, which is an attack on the integrity and effectiveness of its government and military officials, fitting the 'Discrediting Ukraine' narrative.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly presents the United States, a key Western power, as passive and ineffective ('अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया'), which aligns with the definition of portraying the West as a non-potent group of countries.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: युद्ध तीसरे साल में प्रवेश कर गया है लेकिन युद्धविराम की कोई संभावना नजर नहीं आती.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement explicitly dismisses the potential for a ceasefire or diplomatic resolution, directly supporting the subnarrative that discredits the potential of ongoing or potential diplomatic efforts.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने जब यूक्रेन पर हमले किए, तो पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय देशों में एक आत्ममुग्धता का भाव था, जिससे वे यह समझकर चल रहे थे कि पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames Western and European countries as acting out of self-absorption ('आत्ममुग्धता') and a mistaken belief in their own global leadership, implying their actions are driven by their own interests and assumptions rather than a genuine concern for Ukraine's fate.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement actively promotes the idea that Western and European sanctions have been ineffective, which discredits Western diplomatic and economic tools. This supports the parent narrative but does not fit neatly into the other specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देशों को इससे बड़ा झटका लगा।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly asserts that the West suffered a significant blow because many countries in the Global South prioritized their own interests over joining Western pressure on Russia, highlighting a negative consequence for Western geopolitical strategy.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote explicitly states that Europe's dependence on Russian energy backfired, causing a major crisis for European countries, which is a clear negative consequence stemming from the conflict.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement declares that Western and European sanctions have largely failed to affect Russia, portraying the West's primary punitive measure as ineffective and thus a negative outcome for Western policy.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेनी सेना के मैन पावर पांच लाख का है लेकिन इससे चार गुना बड़ी रूसी सेना के सामने वे दो साल से टिके हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly compares the Ukrainian military's manpower unfavorably to Russia's, emphasizing its smaller size and implicitly questioning its ability to sustain a prolonged defense, which undermines its perceived strength and effectiveness.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly accuses the Ukrainian military procurement system of large-scale corruption ('धांधली'), which serves to delegitimize the Ukrainian government and its officials by portraying them as corrupt and incompetent in managing the war effort.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote explicitly states that Ukraine is 'completely dependent' on Western countries for military equipment, framing its war effort not as an independent national endeavor but as one controlled and sustained by foreign powers, which aligns with the 'puppet' narrative.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: युद्ध तीसरे साल में प्रवेश कर गया है लेकिन युद्धविराम की कोई संभावना नजर नहीं आती. इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This passage paints a bleak picture of the conflict's trajectory, stating there is no prospect for a ceasefire and that even the US appears to be standing by idly, while Ukraine clings to hope for aid. This portrays Ukraine's situation as having no viable positive resolution or future.
